texto: Shayna thinking about Jensen:" ....From my first glance I knew he was atleast three or four inches taller than me and I could tell his lightweight sweater hid a well muscled chest and arms, but lean, not meaty. I was aware of an excess of saliva in my mouth and forced myself to swallow, trying not to blush when I heard Jodi snicker quietly next to me.
explicacao: Citação de Shauna Granger sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Shayna thinking about Jensen:" ....From my first glance I knew he was atleast three or four inche…” articula reflexao, humorous, shayna em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
